name: Western Frittata
recipeIngredient: 16 oz American-style frozen potatoes, green beans, onions, and red peppers, thawed
1 can Sliced mushrooms, well drained (4 1/2 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 12-inch nonstick skillet over medium-high heat, brown the turkey and garlic in oil for 10-12 minutes, stirring frequently.
2. Add salt, cumin, sage, thyme, pepper, and vegetables; mix well.
3. Reduce heat to low. Pour eggs over the vegetable mixture in the skillet.
4. Cover and cook for 15-20 minutes.
5. While cooking, use a spatula to lift the vegetable mixture around the edge of the skillet, allowing uncooked eggs to flow to the bottom.
6. Cook until the eggs are set. Sprinkle with mushrooms and cheese.
7. Cover and cook for an additional 3 minutes or until the cheese begins to melt.
8. Loosen the edges of the frittata and slide it onto a large serving plate. Cut into wedges.
